detail.description:
This easy-to-learn 3D Roguelike shooter adventure offers a fresh and exciting experience with every match.

[Easy to Learn, Addictive After Just One Game]
Simple controls, fast-paced gameplay, fight anytime! The exhilarating feeling of clearing the screen with a single shot is endless; the more you play, the more you can't stop.

[Free Assembly, Craft Unique Mechs]
Over 30 mech configurations, over 180 weapons to choose from - Want to breathe fire? A giant chainsaw? Or launch multiple missiles?
detail.recentChanges:
1. Cơ giáp thức tỉnh chí tôn+2 mở thêm cơ giáp mới - Nữ Hoàng Kim Cương Pha Lê
2. Thêm sự kiện lễ mừng máy chủ mới
3. Phi công mới và phi hành khí cấp S sắp ra mắt
